confirmed_findings.summary: uploadOptionDocument had no org-centered audit trail after successful upload
Option document technical upload hardening already matches upload parity requirements
When org context is unavailable in legacy/malformed request rows, upload remains successful and audit is skipped by warning

fixed_now: uploadOptionDocument now resolves option request org context and emits logAction(type=option, action=option_document_uploaded, source=api)
Added focused unit test for successful upload path with org-context audit dispatch
manual_review_required: If future product UI allows model-side option document upload with no resolvable org fields, decide explicit fallback logging strategy
